---
title: "My Resume"
---

```{=html}
<style>
.resume-toolbar {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.75rem;
}

.resume-toolbar p {
  margin: 0;
  color: #6b7280;
  font-size: 0.875rem;
}

.download-btn {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.5rem;
  background: #1a6cf5;
  color: #ffffff !important;
  font-size: 0.875rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  padding: 0.55rem 1.2rem;
  border-radius: 8px;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  transition: background 0.2s ease, transform 0.15s ease;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(26,108,245,0.3);
}

.download-btn:hover {
  background: #1558d0;
  transform: translateY(-1px);
  box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(26,108,245,0.4);
  text-decoration: none !important;
}

.download-btn svg {
  width: 15px;
  height: 15px;
  fill: currentColor;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.resume-frame {
  width: 100%;
  height: 860px;
  border: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
  border-radius: 10px;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
}
</style>

<div class="resume-toolbar">
  <p>Viewing resume inline — download a copy below.</p>
  <a class="download-btn" href="files/FT_ShreyaAnekarResume.pdf" download="Shreya_Anekar_Resume.pdf">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 20 20" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
      <path d="M10 2a1 1 0 011 1v9.586l2.293-2.293a1 1 0 111.414 1.414l-4 4a1 1 0 01-1.414 0l-4-4a1 1 0 111.414-1.414L9 12.586V3a1 1 0 011-1zM3 17a1 1 0 011-1h12a1 1 0 110 2H4a1 1 0 01-1-1z"/>
    </svg>
    Download PDF
  </a>
</div>
```

{{< pdf files/FT_ShreyaAnekarResume.pdf width=100% height=800 >}}
